scripts.db:create:local: echo 'Local D1 database is created automatically when running wrangler dev'
scripts.db:seed: echo 'Use pnpm run seed from root directory instead'
scripts.db:seed:local: echo 'Use pnpm run seed --local from root directory instead'
scripts.db:seed:prod: echo 'Use pnpm run seed from root directory instead'
scripts.db:setup: pnpm run db:migrate && pnpm run db:seed
scripts.db:setup:local: pnpm run db:migrate:local && pnpm run db:seed:local
scripts.db:setup:prod: pnpm run db:migrate:prod && pnpm run db:seed:prod
